channel.title: first on Patrick Durkee change
channel.description: Recent content in first on Patrick Durkee change

item.title: Hello, world?
item.description: I’ve never blogged before nor have I had any strong inclinations to do so, but I recently convinced myself it might be a “fun” way to spend some of my free time while still bettering myself academically. So, I made this website and I’m going to give academic-blogging a go. I’m not entirely sure what I’ll blog about, but I have some general ideas. My main goals for this blog include writing R tutorials, summarizing interesting articles, and reporting results of casual research studies I conduct (e.
